TextView.android:text:
I.Physical Vitality

-Active Minutes: Aim for 150 minutes of moderate intensity activity (like brisk walking) per week.
-The Every Hour Rule: Stand up and stretch for 2 minutes every hour during work or study sessions.
-Strength Foundations: Complete 2 sessions of bodyweight exercises (push-ups, squats, or planks).
-Step Milestone: Reach a personalized daily step goal (e.g., 7,000 steps) for at least 5 out of 7 days.

II.Nutrition and Hydration

-The H2O Habit: Drink 2 liters of water daily for the entire week.
-Colorful Plates: Include at least two different colors of vegetables in every dinner.
-Mindful Eating: Spend at least 20 minutes eating one meal a day without any digital distractions (phone or TV).
-Home-Cooked Streak: Prepare at least 4 meals from scratch to better control ingredients and portions.

III.Mental and Emotional Balance

-Daily Stillness: Practice 5 to 10 minutes of guided meditation or deep breathing exercises each morning.
-Gratitude Log: Write down three things you are grateful for before going to bed every night.
-Digital Sunset: Turn off all electronic screens 30 minutes before sleep to improve rest quality.
-Single-Tasking: Focus on one major task at a time for 60 minutes without switching tabs or checking notifications.

IV.Rest and Recovery

-Consistent Rhythm: Go to bed and wake up within the same 30-minute window every day, even on weekends.
-The 7-Hour Club: Track sleep to ensure a minimum of 7 hours of rest for at least 5 nights.
-Unplugged Day: Dedicate Sunday (or any chosen day) to a 4-hour no-tech period to reset.
